title: Better Powdered Snow
description: A texture pack that makes Powdered Snow more Visible!
body:
# Information

**Better Powdered Snow** is a utility pack that changes the texture of Powdered Snow to have a blue tint so that it is easily recognisable when placed next to real snow.


![Designed for Caves and Cliffs and Above, View on Github, Supports up to Tricky Trials](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/972e420a83300f66eda0ad5f33d4f57099a6c2fb.png)

## Modpacks
Please Credit me when using this in a modpack.

# Issues
_No Current Issues_

## Help

### Please Update to x.xx
This texture pack should work in all Versions after 20w46a.
**It has been updated to the Latest Minecraft version.**
I have made a new version with all versions merged into one file, which means these versions are now deprecated, and I strongly reccommend you use the Inclusive Version.
